description: A rough and ready eco-warrior style bag from turtle which is just as practical as it is stylish. You'll not only enjoy the practical use of the bag, but you can also rest easy knowing that you're supporting a company who care about the Earth. The brand has a great program in place for saving sea turtles in Orissa. Height: 39 cm Base Diameter: 25 cm Made of canvas with synthetic leather trims for enhanced durability and comfort Round base Roomy inner compartment fully lined with insert pockets for essentials Drawstring woven through metal eyelets at the mouth to close One long, adjustable, woven shoulder strap for carrying ease and style A zippered compartment at the back for essentials Printed branding on the front Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with damp clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not bleach, line dry, iron or dry clean
